feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I use a range as a filter in cds views
entry.content:
I want the abap cds view to filter (as parameters) on a range of dates. 

Example 

 

select * from table where dates between :p1 and :p2 ; 

how do I do this ? ( p1 and p2 are parameters )

entry.title: S/4 ABAP CDS VIEW / WDA - Select option doesn't display the selected elements - IMPR
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently creating a report in IM for the Fiori frontend as a Web Dynpro application. My source is a self-developed data model based on ACDOCA with the additional information from IMPR, IMTP & IMZO.

The aim of the report is to be able to select an investment program and an approval year and then select the selection program positions that exist in the investment program. The selected actual postings are then displayed in the report.

The report and the selection of the approval year and the investment program work as expected.

My IMPR Masterdata:

 

define view ZI_IMPR_MD as select  from impr as _impr
association [0..*] to ZB_IMPR_TEXT  as _Text on $projection.posnr = _Text.Posnr and $projection.IM_GJAHR = _Text.Gjahr
association [0..*] to ZI_IMPR_HI  as _Hier on $projection.posnr = _Hier.HierarchyNode and $projection.IM_GJAHR = _Hier.IM_GNJHR
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.IM_GJAHR = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
    @ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_Hier'
    @ObjectModel.text.element:  [ 'Hier_Text' ] 
    key _impr.posnr,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    key _impr.gjahr as IM_GJAHR,
    
    _impr.posid as IM_POSID,
    _impr.parnr as IM_PARNR,
    _impr.vernr as IM_VERNR,
    _impr.objnr as IM_OBJNR,
    
    _Text.Post1 as     Hier_Text,
 
   
//Make association public   
    _Text,
    _Hier,
    _GJAHR
}

 

IMPR Hierarchy:

 

@ObjectModel: { dataCategory: #HIERARCHY }
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZIIMPRHI'
@Hierarchy.parentChild.name: 'IMPR_01'
@Hierarchy.parentChild.label: 'IM IMPR Hierarchy 01'
@Hierarchy.parentChild: 
{ recurse:          {   parent: 'ParentNode',   child:  'HierarchyNode'   },
  siblingsOrder:    {   by: 'HierarchyNode',    direction: 'ASC'   },
  directory:        '_Hierarchy',
  orphanedNode.handling: #IGNORE }
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED 
define view ZI_IMPR_HI as select from impr
association [0..1] to ZI_IMPR_MD as _IMPR on $projection.HierarchyNode = _IMPR.posnr and $projection.IM_GNJHR = _IMPR.IM_GJAHR 
association [1..1] to ZB_IMTP_MD as _Hierarchy  on  $projection.POSNRHierarchy = _Hierarchy.Prnam and $projection.IM_GNJHR = _Hierarchy.Gjahr
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.IM_GNJHR = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Consumption.filter: {mandatory : true, selectionType : #SINGLE, multipleSelections : false }
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Hierarchy'
    key prnam  as POSNRHierarchy,   
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_IMPR'
    key posnr as HierarchyNode,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    gjahr as IM_GNJHR,
    
    posid as IM_POSID,
    parnr as ParentNode,
    prnam as IM_PRNAM,

//Make association public 
   _IMPR,
   _Hierarchy,
   _GJAHR

 

Hierarchy directory IMTP

 

@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'Prnam'
@EndUserText.label: 'Basic View for IMTP'
define view ZB_IMTP_MD as select from imtp
association [0..1] to ZB_IMTP_TEXT as _Text on $projection.Prnam = _Text.Prnam and $projection.Gjahr = _Text.Gjahr 
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.Gjahr = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
    @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
    key prnam as Prnam,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    key gjahr as Gjahr,

//Make association public     
    _Text,
    _GJAHR
}

 

I join my hierarchy view with my data flow:

 

association[0..*] to ZI_IMPR_MD as _POSNR on $projection.Posnr = _POSNR.posnr and $projection.Gjahr = _POSNR.IM_GJAHR

 

..and then create my selection option in the Consumtion View: 

 

@AnalyticsDetails.query.variableSequence: 5
@Consumption.filter: {  selectionType: #HIERARCHY_NODE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false,
                        hierarchyBinding : [  { type: #PARAMETER, value: 'p_invprog', variableSequence: 45 },   
                                              { type: #PARAMETER, value: 'p_gjahr', variableSequence: 45 } ] }                                             
@AnalyticsDetails.query.displayHierarchy: #FILTER
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
@AnalyticsDetails.query.totals: #SHOW
    Posnr,

 

 

As you can see, the hierarchy is displayed in the report:

The hierarchy node parameter also shows the values in a hierarchy:

If I now select a node and then press "Start" to run the report, I get no values.

Although there are definitely values without the selection.
Does anyone know why no values are displayed when a node is selected?

entry.title: How to read .plv file for ABAP CDS view performance analysis and tie it back to CDS view?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have been going over various blogs on 'how to analyse performance of the ABAP CDS view'. Although there is enough documentation on the steps to perform the analysis, but there isn't any documentation on how to read/analyse the .plv file in HANA Planviz perspective and tie it back to the CDS view.

As in, which join/which line/which underlying cds view is causing performance issue?

What is the threshold (in ms) for a step to be considered for a performance analysis?

Most of the times when an analytical query, built on a CDS view is run for performance test, it isn't captured properly in the ST05 trace. Then a work around is to capture the technical name of the analytical query prefix it with 2C and run in tcode-rsrt and capture the log in ST05 trace. All these issues impact the analysis process. 

Any solution to the above issues or directing to a better/simpler process for CDS view performance analyses is greatly appreciated.

Awaiting for some constructive responses. Thank You.

entry.title: deficit of PL Stock in transfer 10- PC : 999925P 7330 in MIGO transaction S4. please help
entry.content: Hi every one i am facing this issue in s4 side while doing MIGO transaction to the reciving plant. can anyone please give me the solution

entry.title: Do not see option to create stories in Manage KPIs and Reports in S/4 HANA Private Cloud RISE
entry.content:
we have S/4 HANA 2023 privated cloud Rise and these systems are integrated using CORS live connectivity.

However do not see the option to create/add stories in the Manage KPIs and Reports section in S/4 HANA Fiori tiles.

Appreciate if you could let us know if we are missing steps with the connectivity/authorizations etc

Best Regards.

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.

entry.title: RRI jump option for the CDS Analytics Queries
entry.content:
Hi , 

we are in S/4HANA (BW 7.56) and using CDS based queries.

I 'm trying to implement a RRI between 2 queries but not able to do achieve it so far.

I have implemented all RRI relevant snotes in the system.

And defined the RRI for a CDS based query on RSBBS transaction.  

and mapped the fields between 2 reports. 

But after RRI setting I'm not able to see jump option on RSRT. I have also tried same in AFO and SAC, also not able to see it there. 

Do you know if I miss anything. Or is it not possible to set up an RRI  between 2 CDS queries ? 

Thanks 

Erkan

entry.title: Can Analytical Queries be used in AFO of SAC Add-In?
entry.content: Can Analytical queries (S4 Public Cloud) be used in Excel based reporting via either the Excel Add-In or AFO edition for SAC?

entry.title: Suppress or filter the Not Assigned(REST_H) nodes in standard CDS Views?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently using the "Custom Analytical Queries" Fiori App for our business case. As our data source, we've chosen the I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem CDS View. Unfortunately, we have encountered an issue where some entries couldn't be assigned correctly and have ended up in the REST_H node.

 

 

I have come across several discussions about suppressing the REST_H node in a CDS Hierarchy. However, since the CDS view we are using is't a Hierarchy, we are uncertain how to implement a similar solution in this context.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue? If so, how did you address it?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Kind regards,
Kosta Naskov

entry.title: S4CLOUD Public version - how to create a previous period or previous year measure?
entry.content: With Public cloud scripting is not available, so trying to find a way to created previous period measures for comparison reasons. This is for Embedded reporting. Either in CDS view or Analytical Queries.  Anyone that can help and provide some guidance?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud: Grouping DATE values by MONTH from linked dimensions in charts
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I have a question about the capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud to group DATE values from two linked data sources (linked dimensions) by MONTH (while also showing unbooked values) in a chart.

So for example, let's say I have the creation dates and EUR values of sales quotations (AG) and a sales orders (TA) in two separate Custom Analytical Queries. 

(I know you can usually get this data from a single CDS view, but for the sake of example, let's say you have two data sources).

 

This would be my sample input data:

And this is the kind of chart that I want to create in with SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud:

This is what I am currently able to create. It is close, but it still lacks the grouping by month:

The creation date dimensions are linked for sales quotation and sales order, and unbooked data is displayed:

 

Unfortunately, when I try to group dates by month/year, I get the error "Failed to fetch data".

 

I guess the grouping can usually be done by changing the hierarchy from "flat presentation" to "year-month-day" and then setting the level to month. 

But something about having linked date dimensions seems to interfere.

Is there a way to make this work?

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Simon

entry.title: Suppress or filter the Not Assigned(REST_H) nodes in standard CDS Views?
entry.content: How can we suppress unmapped nodes, such as the "Rest_H" node, that appear when activating the Cost Center, Profit Center, or G/L Account hierarchy in a self-made embedded analytics report based on the "I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem" data source? We are using the Fiori App Custom Analytical Queries (F1572) to consume this data source and have created a Fiori Tile for the report. We would like to achieve this suppression without requiring any manual filters to be selected in the report when changing the hierarchy.

entry.title: How to use ARTNR in the context of SAP S/4HANA Margin Analysis: Attributed Profitability Segment
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently trying to make use of the field ARTNR in the context of the new attributed profitability segments in margin analysis.

Therefore, I maintained respective maintenance order types in this IMG activity:

Subsequently, I populated the settlement rules with the needed PSG information via KEDR. So far, this has worked all quite well. However, I now want to also make use of the field ARTNR (Product) which is displayed in said PSG of the settlement rule: 

Now, the problem is, that ACDOCA apparently does not contain the field ARTNR. I found that ARTNR and MATNR share the same domain (MATNR) but the field MATNR in ACDOCA also remains empty after creating some test documents.

I also found that I am not able to add either MATNR nor ARTNR to my operating concern in KEA5. 

The last option I am currently thinking of, is creating a custom field that is basically a copy of ARTNR and defining a Move via KEDR to transfer the ARTNR value to the new custom field.

As this last mentioned idea seems a bit odd to me, I would like to ask if someone has encountered similar problems and/or can maybe share a solution approach.

Thanks in advance

Kind regards

Alex

entry.title: OData missing after publishing Custom analytical query via Fiori App
entry.content:
Dear,

We have created an analytical query using the standard Fiori Custom Analytical queries App. The query is published and the status is green. We are able also to preview data without any issue.

However when selecting the query from Manage KPIs and reports Fiori A, the Odata service and the Entity is not filled.

 I believe that the OData should be generated when publishing the query using the custom Analytical query App.

Any idea on this.

Thanks a lot

Abdess

entry.title: when i try to pull cds with parameter in powerbi throwing a error
entry.content:
Hi,

we are facing some issue when i try to pull a customizing CDS  view with parameter in Powerbi using odata url .IT is giving a me error which has OData: Request failed: The remote server returned an error:Parameter entity set 'XYZ' cannot be used for read).

could you please let us know what was the reason behind getting this error..?

Thanks in advance,

Rakesh G

entry.title: Review Booklet Designer Add More Analytical Queries
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I wanted to expand the Review Booklet by adding my own queries. Unfortunately, when creating the Business Page and the Page, the following error is displayed. Even though I have made all the settings in Custom Analytical Queries and Services. 

 

In addition, I have also defined all fields as shown in the image above.

Does anyone know what could be causing the error?

regards,

Mert

entry.title: Query related to SAP Note-2270261
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am seeking one clarification about SAP Note 2270261.

In note it is mentioned that-With SAP S/4HANA 1511 the target for links and references in reports CJI3N, CJI4N, CN41, CNS0 is going to the single maintenance transaction CJ20N (Project Builder).and n case of custom code for special maintenance functions only, customer should consider to enable the custom code for the Project Builder transactions

I am not getting exactly what will be changing by target for links and  references in reports means and for what exactly need to consider to enable CJ20N from custom code perspective.

Awaiting more clear understanding about this . thanks.

Regards,

Prajakta

entry.title: KPI Modeler vs "Manage KPI and Reports" app
entry.content:
"KPI Modeler" vs "Manage KPI and Reports" app

 

- Are these two the same,

- is KPI modeler  older version..?

- Is KPI Modeler still relevant & avaialbe in latest 2022/23 versions..?

- What is the difference.?

- How to install KPI Modeler

Thanks a lot in Advance

Gaya3K

entry.title: Logic for schedule is frozen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a one requirement such that A field indicating when the schedule is frozen should be added to the table (Power BI) which in turn data pulling from CDS View . (It would be worthwhile to just show the status when the schedule is frozen).

So in CDS view what logic have to be written for displaying as schedule is frozen like how can i display schedule is frozen for the Maintenance order or work orders?

below is the standard CDS view C_RSHMaintSchedFrozenOp .we will be creating a customizing cds view on top of this there i need a scneario how can i write a logic to be written for schedule is frozen?

 

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Spend Analysis by cost centre, display cost centre name
entry.content:
I am learning Spend analysis
I navigated to Query Browser -> C_PurchaseOrderValueQuery
I have made a simple year to date spend analysis by Company Code and Cost Centre (see image, if working below)
As you can see the cost centre are represented by the ID CH101500, the name of which is Engineering.

Is there a way to display the cost centre name, rather than the cost centre ID?
This would make the analysis much more user friendly to the wider business order

Thanks

Ian
